text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I let my mind wander during training again. 
The park holds far too many temptations…

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Puppies running around… kittens sharpening their claws… Aagh…!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No, the environment is not to blame. 
The fault lies with my mind's fragility.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And the remedy… building tolerance 
with animal encyclopedias…!
